comparison_failure: BarReconstructionError: Provider bar missing trade_count field | context={'trade_count_key': 'trade_count'}

config.note: Binance aggTrades count is NOT semantically equivalent to the provider kline's raw-trade count; aggTrades count reported separately, never presented as raw-trade count.

provider_kline_raw_trade_count: UNAVAILABLE — Binance kline schema has no raw-trade-count field; the toolkit's compare_bars hard-requires a trade_count field on provider bars. aggTrades record count is structurally DISTINCT from a kline's raw-trade count and is NEVER presented as one.
semantic_mismatch_flag: aggTrades record count != provider kline raw-trade count (field absent on klines; toolkit limitation)
